free_text: The (3He,d) reaction on 24Mg and 28Si at 38.5 MeV
Particle identification in the focal plane
counter was accomplished by measuring the total
energy of the particle, as registered in a plastic
proportional counter. The background was reduced by
demanding a fast coincidence between the scintillator
signal and the anode signal of the proportional
counter. The resolution at small angles was typically
40 keV, as expected from the first-order beam optics
of the system. It proved possible to obtain data down
to angles as small as 2.5 degrees.
No details on sources of uncertainties.
